design_philosophy: A modern, premium telehealth and e-commerce platform for integrative veterinary medicine. The design must evoke trust, calm, and natural healing. Avoid cold, clinical whites and instead use warm bone-whites, deep forest greens, and sage to create a nurturing, earthy environment.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1A2E24]

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous spacing. Use 2x standard padding for sections (py-24 or py-32 for desktop). Elements should have 'breathing room'.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' variations for the product categories and features. Use gap-6 to gap-8 between items.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C4C3B] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#1A2E24] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#84978F] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#6B8077] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#2C4C3B] text-[#2C4C3B] hover:bg-[#2C4C3B]/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#E0DDD5] rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,76,59,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_12px_48px_rgba(44,76,59,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.image_treatment: Images inside cards must be rounded-2xl with max-h-[80vh] constraint.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#2C4C3B]/10 transition-all duration-300

forms_and_inputs.style: bg-white/50 border border-[#E0DDD5] focus:border-[#84978F] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#84978F] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 w-full text-[#1A2E24]

hero.description: Golden retriever dog in a natural outdoor setting. Use for the main hero section to communicate natural wellness.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on cards with expanded shadow.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Opacity or slight darkening on hover. Must explicitly declare hover:text-* colors to maintain contrast.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade and slight slide-up (using Framer Motion if applicable, or CSS animations) for major sections.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses a gradient overlay (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A2E24]/80 to-transparent) to guarantee readability.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use default Tailwind blue/gray scales. Stick STRICTLY to the colors defined in this JSON.
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts using standard Google Fonts links or next/font if in Next.js, and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Build the navigation with a sticky header. Include a prominent 'Agendar Consulta' (Schedule Consultation) CTA and 'Entrar' (Login).
Create a Hero Section containing the main headline, a trusting subheadline, the 'Golden retriever' hero image (either as side-by-side or a large immersive block with overlay), and clear CTAs.
Implement a 'Product Categories' grid using the Bento layout style. Use the provided category images.
Add a 'WhatsApp' floating action button (FAB) fixed to the bottom right for instant contact.
Ensure all Shadcn UI components (buttons, inputs, dialogs) are customized to match the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette (override default ring colors and borders).
